selected_issues.title: [billwatch] Provider database with deregulated market data and energy switching CTA
selected_issues.reason: P0 — CONTINUE PARTIAL WORK, REVENUE CONTENT. Partial implementation merged via WIP PR #359. Provider DB with energy switching CTAs is the revenue content users interact with — deregulated market data for 18+ states, provider comparisons, switching CTAs with affiliate links. Revenue chain: user uploads bill → anomaly detected → provider switching CTA → affiliate link → tracked click → commission. BillWatch at 28 PRs merged, actively building toward first dollar. Worker continues from partial work in main.

selected_issues.title: [scorerebound] Credit-builder product comparison page — /compare/credit-builders
selected_issues.reason: P0 — SEO + AFFILIATE REVENUE PAGE, WORKING FUNNEL. ScoreRebound has working affiliate infrastructure (31 PRs merged, #349 affiliate products shipped, #350 servicer SEO pages now COMPLETE). This comparison page captures high-intent searches ('best credit builder loan', 'best secured credit card bad credit') → authoritative comparison table → affiliate link click → commission ($5-75 per conversion). No dependencies. Well-scoped single-page feature. Most direct path to ScoreRebound's first affiliate dollar.

selected_issues.title: [cellscore] Core MVP — address coverage checker, plan recommender, plan comparison
selected_issues.reason: P0 — PORTFOLIO DIVERSITY, BUILD ON COMPLETED FOUNDATION. CellScore has only 2 PRs merged — most underinvested active product. Plan database seed (#346) just COMPLETED this cycle, so the data foundation (60+ plans from 15+ carriers with affiliate URLs) is now in place. This is the natural next step: build the core product experience (address → coverage check → plan recommendation → comparison → affiliate click). Without the core MVP, all that plan data sits unused. Revenue path: core MVP → landing page (#246) → affiliate integration (#250) → commission.
